title: Singin' in the Rain
description: A joyful song about a man walking and dancing through a downpour, splashing in puddles, completely in love and not caring that he's soaked.

title: Purple Rain
description: A sweeping emotional rock ballad about love, regret and forgiveness, with a man singing under a purple sky in the rain, building to a famous guitar solo.

title: November Rain
description: A long orchestral power ballad about enduring love through hard times, with rain imagery, a wedding, and an extended guitar solo in the desert.

title: Set Fire to the Rain
description: A powerful breakup ballad where a woman sings about a turbulent love, with rain as a recurring metaphor for pain, anger and letting go.

title: Have You Ever Seen the Rain?
description: A wistful rock song asking whether you've seen rain coming down on a sunny day, using the weather as a metaphor for trouble during good times.

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
description: An operatic rock epic that shifts between ballad, opera and hard rock, telling a surreal story of a young man who confesses he has killed and faces judgement.

title: Billie Jean
description: A tense pop song with an iconic bassline about a man denying a woman's claim that he is the father of her child.

title: Thriller
description: A pop song about a horror-movie night with monsters, zombies and a creeping sense of dread, famous for its spoken vampire-voice ending.

title: Hotel California
description: A haunting rock song about a traveler who checks into a luxurious hotel he can never leave, an allegory of excess from which you can check out but never escape.

title: Stairway to Heaven
description: An epic rock song that builds slowly from a gentle acoustic ballad to a thunderous climax, about a woman buying a stairway to heaven and the search for meaning.

title: Imagine
description: A gentle piano ballad imagining a peaceful world with no countries, no possessions and no reasons to fight, a hopeful anthem for unity.

title: Yesterday
description: A melancholy ballad about longing for the past, when love was easy, sung by a man missing the way things used to be.

title: Let It Be
description: A comforting piano ballad about finding peace in times of trouble, with words of wisdom telling you to let it be.

title: Hey Jude
description: An uplifting song encouraging a sad friend to take a sad song and make it better, ending in a long communal na-na-na singalong.

title: Like a Rolling Stone
description: A biting rock song addressed to a once-privileged woman who has lost everything and is now on her own with no direction home.

title: Smells Like Teen Spirit
description: A loud, angry grunge anthem of teenage apathy and rebellion, with a quiet-loud guitar riff and mumbled, frustrated lyrics.

title: Wonderwall
description: A wistful 90s britpop song about someone who might be the one who saves you, with strummed acoustic guitar and a longing chorus.

title: Sweet Child o' Mine
description: A rock love song with a famous winding guitar intro, about a man whose lover reminds him of warm childhood memories.

title: Every Breath You Take
description: A deceptively gentle song that sounds romantic but is really about obsessive surveillance, a man watching every move his former lover makes.

title: Dancing Queen
description: A glittering disco song about a seventeen-year-old girl having the time of her life dancing, feeling the beat from the tambourine.

title: I Will Always Love You
description: A soaring breakup ballad where a woman leaves the man she loves but promises she will always love him, famous for its huge climactic note.

title: My Heart Will Go On
description: A romantic ballad from a famous shipwreck film about love surviving beyond death and distance, opening with a tin whistle melody.

title: Rolling in the Deep
description: A fierce soulful breakup song about a scorned lover turning heartbreak into fire, vowing the betrayer will pay for what they did.

title: Someone Like You
description: A bare piano ballad about showing up at an old lover's door after they've married someone else, wishing them well through tears.

title: Shape of You
description: A bouncy pop song about falling for someone at a bar and on the dance floor, drawn to the shape of them.

title: Thinking Out Loud
description: A tender wedding-style love song about still loving someone when they're old and grey, with soulful guitar.

title: Rocket Man
description: A lonely song about an astronaut far from home, missing his family while drifting through space doing his job.

title: Your Song
description: A sweet, simple piano love song where a shy man offers a song as his gift, wishing he could put his feelings into words.

title: Sweet Home Alabama
description: A proud southern rock anthem about longing for a hometown in the American South, with a famous guitar riff.

title: Take Me Home, Country Roads
description: A warm folk song about country roads carrying a traveler home to the West Virginia mountains where he belongs.

title: Born to Run
description: A roaring rock anthem about young lovers wanting to escape their dead-end town on the highway, driving toward a better life.

title: Summer of '69
description: A nostalgic rock song about a man looking back on the best summer of his youth, his first band and a teenage romance.

title: Don't Stop Believin'
description: An uplifting arena-rock anthem about a small-town girl and a city boy chasing their dreams, telling everyone to hold on to that feeling.

title: Africa
description: A lush soft-rock song with dreamy synths about longing for Africa, blessing the rains and a love bigger than the world.

title: Wish You Were Here
description: A melancholy acoustic rock song about absence and lost connection, wishing a distant friend were here instead of two lost souls in a fishbowl.

title: Comfortably Numb
description: A dreamy, detached rock song about numbness and dissociation, with two famous soaring guitar solos.

title: Hallelujah
description: A solemn, aching ballad weaving biblical imagery with broken love, building each verse to a quiet, sorrowful hallelujah.

title: Nothing Compares 2 U
description: A devastating breakup ballad about how nothing and no one compares to a lost love, sung over a single tear-streaked close-up.

title: Tears in Heaven
description: A grieving acoustic ballad a father wrote after losing his young son, wondering if his child would know his name in heaven.

title: Losing My Religion
description: A jangly mandolin-driven song about unspoken longing and self-doubt, a man agonizing over whether he's said too much or not enough.

title: Creep
description: A self-loathing alternative rock song about feeling like an outsider, obsessing over someone too beautiful and special for him.

title: Zombie
description: A fierce protest rock song about the violence of war and conflict, mourning children lost while the fighting drags on in someone's head.

title: Wind of Change
description: A whistled rock ballad about hope and political change sweeping across the world, a wind carrying a new era.

title: Viva la Vida
description: An orchestral pop-rock song narrated by a fallen king who once ruled the world and now hears the people's bells ringing for his end.

title: Fix You
description: A slow-building anthem about comforting someone through grief and failure, promising to try to fix them, ending in a soaring guitar swell.

title: Bridge over Troubled Water
description: A gospel-tinged ballad promising to be a comforting bridge for a friend in pain and hard times, building to a powerful finish.
